stemHtml: According to SERA, the appropriate course of action for a VFR flight, operated as a controlled flight within a CTR, if the weather deteriorates below VMC is…

options.a: To request authorisation to operate as a special VFR flight.
options.b: To continue in accordance with the current ATC flight plan.
options.c: To descend to the Minimum Sector Altitude.
options.d: To proceed in IMC, notifying ATC.
